notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the curl SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.6. It addresses 23 CVEs: CVE-2023-28322, CVE-2023-46218, CVE-2024-11053, CVE-2024-2398, CVE-2026-7168, and 18 more.
